title: symphyotrichum dumosum var. gracilipes
intro: Symphyotrichum dumosum var. gracilipes, also known as New York ironweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. New York ironweed is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
